programme.title: Bloomberg TV+
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: Life & Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Frontier Surgeon : During the holdup of a stage, gang leader Tinkham Brown is wounded. Earp wants Doc Goodfellow to tell Earp if the outlaws come after him but Doc Goodfellow refuses.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Let's Hang Curly Bill : Marshal Fred White tries to take the pistol from a drunk Curly Bill Brocius but White's actions cause the gun to fire and he is mortally wounded.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Silver Dollar : Earp rescues a new girl called Silver Dollar from an amorous man in front of the Alhambra where she works and takes her to Nellie Cashman for a new job.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Case of Senor Huerto : A boy and his mother from Mexico arrive in Tombstone asking Earp to turn over the body of his father who was murdered in Tombstone by a Mr. Granby.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Arizona Lottery : A string of murders occur at Tombstone caused by the Tucson Ten Percent Ring stealing the winning Arizona lottery tickets.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Don't Get Tough with a Sailor : Earp must contend with Capt. Rowland who runs his own legal system on his property -- including a jail.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Scout : An Army scout returns to Tombstone and finds his wife killed by the Apaches in retribution for his attacks on Apache renegades.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Buntline Special : Billy Clanton arrives home unexpectedly from school in San Antonio. Emma wants Old Man Clanton to send him back to school but Billy and his brothers Phin and Ike have other ideas.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: China Mary : With several hundred Chinese people in Tombstone, resentment brews among them about their treatment.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: His Life in His Hands : Earp has convinced Wells Fargo to use undercover agents to help protect shipments but the job is dangerous.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Behan's Double Game : Earp learns Old Man Clanton is moving some of his stolen silver. Earp catches two of the gang and some silver but Sheriff Behan releases the men saying they escaped.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Salvation of Emma Clanton : Old Man Clanton wants Emma to marry vicious outlaw Gringo Hawkby but Emma is against it. She turns to Nellie Cashman and Earp for help in persuading her father to change his mind.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: John Clum, Fighting Editor : Old Man Clanton gives Sheriff Behan orders to run John P. Clum out of town. Clanton is afraid important people might see Clum's paper and learn the truth.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Court vs. Doc Holliday : After $40,000 is stolen from Wells Fargo's safe, a drunk Doc Holliday rides into Tombstone with $4000 in stolen bonds. Since he was named as one of the robbers, Earp is forced to arrest him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Roscoe Turns Detective : Army mule and horse remounts are stolen from a Tombstone stable. The owner was severely injured and didn't see the robbers but Roscoe did and was kicked by a stolen mule.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Posse : The San Berdoo gang is hitting Arizona on their way to Mexico. Earp dislikes posses but the size of the gang mandates one.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Confidence Man : A young man arrives in Tombstone looking for Evangeline Murphy. But a look at her picture tells John Clum she is really Evie Marlowe, a saloon singer.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Toughest Judge in Arizona : A robbery starts a series of events that lead Johnny Ringo to kidnap Judge Spicer to release his cousin Charlie Parks from jail.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: My Enemy - John Behan : After Wells Fargo is robbed and an agent killed, Thacker pressures Earp to capture the killers.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt's Bitterest Enemy : The heat on the Ten Percent Ring has reached Washington, who is considering a new territorial governor.

programme.title: FBI Files
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Human Prey : Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Home Invaders : Too often, convicted felons learn new techniques and find new partners in prison. In 1982, a group of former inmates began a spree of kidnapping and robbery.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Obsession : Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Influence : In the 1980's, thousands of violent criminals flooded into America from Cuba and Colombia. Drugs hit South Florida and the area bloated with illicit wealth became a violent powder keg.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Death in Alaska : The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Cruel Revenge : A kidnapping can shatter a family, bringing terror and heartache without warning. In 1984 with the flash of a gun, an ordinary business transaction became a violent abduction. In seconds, the son of a wealthy Miami developer was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Silent Strike : Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Held Hostage : When a bank teller arrived at her parent's home the gunmen were already there. The robbers held her family hostage and forced her to empty a bank vault. If she didn't comply she could lose everyone she loved.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Criminal Enterprise : Caught in the act, a disguised bank robber hurled explosives at police and disappeared in a hail of bullets. When police identified the suspect, they connected him to an armed kidnapping, but they couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Hunter's Game : In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Fateful Crossing : When the victim of a violent crime is a member of law enforcement, the job of investigating becomes personal. At a United States border crossing, armed fugitives kidnapped a customs' inspector then vanished.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Payout : In 1980 the FBI faced the largest explosive device they had ever seen. The bomb was sophisticated, carefully constructed, and designed to destroy an entire building.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Without Mercy : Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Terror For Sale : In the 1980s the drug trade ravaged Chicago's inner city neighborhoods. Heroin and cocaine sales soared. Violent crime threatened to destroy the community.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Held For Ransom : Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Dangerous Cause : In the late 70s and early 80s, a legitimate Puerto Rican independence movement took hold in the United States. But a splinter terrorist group known as the FALN was suspected of executing hundreds of bombings in major US cities.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Dead In The Water : Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bodies of Evidence : It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Price of Murder : Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Coroner's Casebook : A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Coroner Investigator : CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fatal Error : Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lasting Impressions : No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fateful Twist : A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Scent Of The Kill : A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Out To Kill : An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killing Time : A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Soldier Stories : This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Electronic Witness : George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Deadly Dealings : For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Flames Of Justice : Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Raw Greed : A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.desc: Bad Gun : Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.desc: The Tyrant : On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.desc: Man on Horseback : A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.desc: Mental Lapse : Josh plays detective when he signs on to help an amnesiac discover his identity.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Angela : After watching her father stabbed to death, a grieving daughter wants immediate justice rather than wait for the slower-moving wheels of justice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Panic : Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Ordeal : Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Coward : Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Surveyors : Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Day of the Hunter : A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mail Order Groom : When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Case of Identity : Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Visitor : Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: War of Nerves : Drug lord Mason Sato is released from prison and determined to seek revenge Mitch Buchannon, who helped send him away. When Sato kidnaps Hobie and Kaye, Mitch and Sato end up in a samurai-style fight to the death.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Big Monday : Reports of a coming storm and enormous waves bring painful memories for Mitch. Meanwhile, Kaye tries to persuade the parents of a deaf girl to send her to sign-language school.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Sea of Flames : A drugged-out drifter torches Eddie's lifeguard tower which leads the team to discover an illegal, lab distributing a new drug. Mitch and Thorpe try to convince the city board to buy wave runners in order to optimize their ability to save lives.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: The Sweetest Thing : When Leah wishes for help making cupcakes for a bake sale, she and the genies find themselves stuck with a giant birthday cake, some farm animals, and a river of cupcake batter. How will Leah finish without any wishes left?

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Dino Might! : After searching endlessly for Zac's missing dinosaur toy, Leah asks her genies to wish up a replacement and gets stuck with a real live Apatosaurus! Leah, Shimmer, and Shine have to figure out a way to fix this behemoth mistake.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Genie Treehouse : Leah and Zac try building a treehouse but find themselves in over their heads. Leah asks her genies for a treehouse and is thrown for a loop when Shimmer and Shine turn her house into a house of trees!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: What a Pig Mess : When Leah's party food accidentally gets run over by Zac, Leah needs to figure out what else to bring fast. Leah asks her genies for more Pigs in a Blanket, but the genies give her real pigs wrapped in a blanket!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Ahoy, Genies! : When Leah's bucket full of beach treasures floats into the vast ocean, Leah summons Shimmer and Shine to help her retrieve the loot.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Lights! Camera! Genies! : Leah and Zac are excited to watch their favorite movie, but Leah's popcorn burns and the movie won't play. Leah asks Shimmer and Shine for some movie magic help, but they accidentally wish the movie to life!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Backyard Ballet : Leah and Zac want to twirl, leap, and reenact their new favorite ballet, Swan Lake. Leah wishes to be a ballerina like the Swan Queen, but the genies mistakenly make her a queen of real swans!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Abraca-Genie : Leah notices Zac the Magician's magic tricks aren't going well, so she calls on her genies for some real magic assistance. But Shimmer and Shine aren't getting the tricks right either, and the girls have a magical mess to fix!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Santa's Little Genies : It's Christmas Eve, and Leah is transported to the North Pole! After Leah accidentally wishes Santa to a tropical island and the elves asleep, it's up to the girls to deliver the presents and save Christmas... genie-style!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Spaceship Wrecked : Astronauts Leah and Zac are on a quest to speak to an alien through their walkie talkies. When Leah wishes to be able to talk to one, Shimmer and Shine poof an alien into her backyard, where she can talk to one face to face!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: A Very Genie Halloweenie : It's Halloween, and Leah invites her genies over to join the fun. Leah makes a wish to make Zac's house look haunted, but the genies turn it into a real haunted house, with a real Frankenstein! It's a spooktacular adventure!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Sleep-Over Party : Leah has invited Shimmer and Shine over for a sleepover party, where they'll eat pizza, dance all night, and sleep in a pillow fort! But when all the party plans go awry, the genies help Leah out with some wish granting.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Game On : Leah and Zac have been saving for months to get the big prize at the arcade. When the ticket counting machine malfunctions and ruins all of their tickets, Leah calls on her genies for some arcade assistance!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Gone Bowlin' : Leah and Zac are pumped for day of bowling! But Leah is having a tough time trying to knock down a single pin, so she calls on Shimmer and Shine to lend a little genie magic to improve her game.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Underground Bound/Wishy Washy Genie : As the girls search for Leah's lost necklace, an underground creature finds it and begins making wishes with it. / After Zac wishes to stay in Zahramay Falls forever, the kids search for a powerful genie to reverse the wish.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Genie for a Day/Zac the Clueless Detective : When Leah wishes to be a genie for the day, Zeta uses magic to have Leah grant her wishes. / When Zac thinks the girls are missing, he plays detective and goes on the search with Kaz.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Carpet Troubles/Dragon Tales : The girls visit the carpet vendor to fix their carpet, while Zeta and Nazboo plan to take some magic thread. / Zeta and Nazboo tell the girls the fun story of how they first met, but their facts don't quite match up.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Samira And Zeta/The Zeta Touch : Samira tells the girls the story of how she and Zeta first met – and how they were once best friends. / The girls must stop Zeta when she takes a scepter that gives her the power to grow magical vines and gems.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Nazboo's Family Reunion/The Darpoppy : When Nazboo's siblings come to visit, Zeta recruits them to help take the girls' gems when they're not home. / When Zac wishes himself into the forest to find a mythical creature, Kaz and the girls adventure to find him.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Rainbow Zahramay : When the magical rainbow water goes out of balance, Samira sends the girls through the waterfall to a new world – Rainbow Zahramay. There, they meet a Waterfall Genie who can help them bring balance to the water.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Hairdos and Don't's/Flower Power : The girls meet a genie with the power to change hairstyles, but Zeta's determined to take the power for herself. / The girls travel to a magic garden, where they meet a Flitter Genie and shrink down to her size to explore.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Dance Magic : Samira takes the girls to learn dance magic from an instructor. But when Zeta takes the instructor's magic shoes and uses them to try taking over Zahramay Falls, the girls must use the dances they learned to stop her.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Hounded/The Sorceress' Apprentice : Zac uses a wish to bring his dog Rocket to Zahramay Falls – but the genies mistake him for a monster. / After using magic to make Zac forget who he is, Zeta trains him as her apprentice and tries teaching him potions.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Abracanope/Treehouse Retreat : The girls befriend a cute creature, only to find out that their magic doesn't work when it's nearby. / Zeta's relaxing night at the treehouse is halted when the girls also show up, so she tries to scare them away.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Whatever Floats Your Boat/Waterbent : A cute little Zenguin takes a wishing coin and leads the girls on a chase around their new boat. / The girls visit Imma, the Waterfall Genie, at her home for a pool party, not knowing that Zeta is close behind.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: All That Glitters/Grab That Gem! : Zeta steals the amazing Glitter Genie's staff. If the girls don't get it back in time, the Glitter Genie's palace will disappear! / When the girls discover a blank gem, they take it to meet the Gem Princess who gives each gem its power.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Glitter Glitch!/Coral Chaos : The girls visit the Glitter Genie to learn glitter magic, but something is causing Shimmer to keep messing up. / The girls visit the Gem Princess, who takes them underwater to help gather crystals in the beautiful coral reef.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Snow Time to Spare/Pet Games : The girls help Layla, the Ice Genie, create fun snow decorations for the upcoming Frosty Fun Festival. / The kids hold a fun sports competition for their pets, Nazboo, and his siblings.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Zahramay Dreams/Careful What You Wish For : The girls meet the Dream Genie and her apprentice, who have the power to make dreams come true. / Samira gives the kids a tour of the magical rooms in her palace, where she makes wishing items for Leah's world.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Nila Out of Water/I Dream of Zeta : Nila, the mermaid, has always wanted to see Zahramay Falls, so the girls take her on a magical tour above water. When the girls help the Dream Genie's apprentice deliver dreams, they accidentally swap Zeta's and Nazboo's.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: A Lightning Colt for Shaya/A Special Delivery : The girls travel with Shaya to an island where they meet the Animal Genie, who looks after all animals. / Shimmer and Shine tell Leah the story of how they met Tala and Nahal, with help from the Animal Genie.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Zahra-Glitter, Zahra-Glow : The girls celebrate Cuddle Buddy Day by helping the Animal Genie deliver pets. But when Zeta uses a spell to make everything dark, the Animal Genie must team up with the Glitter Genie to make the pets glow so they can see.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Brave-ish/Nazboo's Magic Kazoo : When Kaz worries he's not brave enough, he adventures with the kids to find a Bravery Gem to help him. / Nazboo finds a kazoo that makes magic stronger when you play it, including Zeta's.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Obama a gagné : Eric Cartman cache un terrible secret dans sa chambre à coucher qui pourrait changer les élections présidentielles 2012 aux États-unis.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tête de nœud : Kyle est en colère contre Cartman qui a pris la mauvaise habitude de parler au téléphone avec le haut-parleur, et l'accuse de se mêler de sa vie privée. Cartman informe alors les autres élèves de l'école que le gouvernement les espionne.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Porno meurtre informatif : Peter Mullen informe ses camarades de classe que ses parents (entre autres !) regardent 'Informative Murder Porn', une émission susceptible de les inciter à s'entretuer. Les enfants décident donc de bloquer les chaines.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: World War Zimmerman : Depuis qu'il a appris que George Zimmerman n'était pas coupable du meurtre de Trayvon Martin, un jeune noir dans un quartier résidentiel aux Etats-Unis, Cartman est perturbé par une personne qu'il considère comme une menace pour l'humanité.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les gothiques 3 : L'aurore des frimeurs : Henrietta, une des gothiques de l'école, est envoyée dans un camp pour enfants en difficulté. Elle en revient transformée en emo. En l'apercevant, les autres gothiques vont paniquer et demander de l'aide aux vampires.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Reluire la plotte : Monsieur Mackey annonce aux élèves de South Park que l'école est maintenant dotée d'un nouveau système informatique : "Intellilink". En essayant d'en faire une démonstration, il s'avère que celui-ci ne fonctionne pas comme prévu.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Black Friday : Les préparatifs de la plus grosse journée de shopping de l'année ont commencé. L'hiver approche et cela ne peut signifier qu'une seule chose : la lutte pour être le premier à entrer dans le centre commercial le fameux "Vendredi noir" est lancée.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Trône de fion : Le black friday approche, les armées des clans de Cartman et Kenny vont s'affronter dans un bain de sang, l'enjeu : les nouvelles consoles de jeu vidéo.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tétons et dragons : Cet épisode est la bataille final entre les pro X-BOX one et PS4, les deux clans plmus que jamais divisés vont se battre jusqu'au bout pour défendre leur console préférée.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Hobbit : Les enfants de South Park découvre Photoshop et son pouvoir d'amélioration physique. Et Wendy va tout faire pour montrer aux garçons que ce n'est pas la vérité.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Va te faire financer : Afin de ne plus être obligés d'aller à l'école ou de faire quoi que ce soit, Stan, Kyle, Cartman, Kenny et Butters décident de créer leur startup en utilisant Kickstarter pour la financer.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Ébola sans gluten : M. Mackey agace tout le monde à propos de son régime alimentaire sans gluten. Après avoir été témoins des risques liés au gluten, les habitants changent radicalement leur comportement alimentaire.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Cissy : Dans le but d'utiliser les toilettes des filles pour échapper aux toilettes bondés des garçons, Cartman annonce qu'il est transgenre. Pendant ce temps, Randy se démène avec sa double identité de Lorde.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Handicar : Le nouveau service de transport de Timmy destiné à recueillir des fonds pour le camp d'été lui fait beaucoup d'ennemis.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Pas drôle : Kyle convainc les habitants de South Park de demander au président de bombarder le Danemark, mais le regrette très vite. Gerald obtient un entretien avec le soi-disant chasseur de trolls danois. Cartman a peur de perdre Heidi.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Rien ne sera plus jamais comme avant : Cartman a percé le secret des femmes et veut empêcher les hommes d'aller sur Mars. Gerald affronte le chasseur de trolls en face à face. De son côté, Kyle tente de sauver le monde.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Des blancs qui rénovent des maisons : Randy découvre ce que cela signifie d'être blanc dans la société d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Raccrochez : La Corée du Nord prend South Park comme cible.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le jour de Christophe Colomb : Un lien indéniable se crée entre un homme blanc et un Amérindien.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le prequel du Coon et sa bande : Facebook est l'arme ultime pour le Professor Chaos.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Hummels et héroïne : Des artistes adorés sont fauchés en pleine jeunesse à cause d'énormes overdoses d'opiacés. Stan est sur le point d'être balancé comme dealer de drogue.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Fils de Potter : Au rassemblement annuel pour Halloween, une sorcière lance un sort qui terrorise tout le monde à South Park.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Mensonges et trahisons : Kyle joue avec le feu en s'interposant dans la relation de Cartman et Heidi.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tardigrades : L'expérience de Jimmy et de Timmy pourrait leur rapporter le premier prix à la foire annuelle des sciences.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Super Principale Adjointe : Les temps sont durs pour ceux qui exercent le métier de principal.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tomates écrabouillées : Les enfants de South Park affirment avoir vu M. Garrison traîner dans le village. Les villageois sont en colère contre le président, qui effraie leurs enfants.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Défunts Enfants : Randy s'acharne à calmer Sharon et Cartman rate son contrôle de maths de façon inattendue.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Garçon et le Prêtre : Butters devient très proche du prêtre de South Park. Un dimanche matin, le prêtre disparaît et l'église est fermée. Les paroissiens décident d'appeler l'archevêque.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Problème de la Crotte : L'attitude agressive de M. Hankey lui vaut la menace d'un renvoi de son poste de directeur du défilé de Noël. Principal PC et la principale adjointe voient leur relation évoluer à un tout autre degré.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Plantation Tégrité : Butters vend des cigarettes électroniques et des liquides fruités à l'école. Randy décide d'emmener sa famille vivre à la campagne pour devenir agriculteur.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les Trottinettes : Les enfants prévoient d'utiliser un moyen de transport révolutionnaire pour collecter plus de bonbons que jamais le soir d'Halloween.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Soyons Sérieuks : Les habitants de South Park sont en danger et les garçons se rendent compte qu'Al Gore peut leur venir en aide.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Personne N'Est Sérieuks : Les garçons s'évadent de prison. Ils sont poursuivis par la police et l'Homoursporc.

programme.desc: Give Her a Hand : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes having man hands and always sending food back at restaurants.

programme.title: Friend or Foe?
programme.desc: Friend or Foe ? : A game of knowledge and trust where teams of players must decide how they want to divide up their winnings.

programme.title: Divided
programme.desc: Every Word Is A Dollar : A unique game show which is as much about convincing others as it is about knowing the right answers. Four strangers including a competitive ballroom dancer and a concierge must debate and unanimously agree against a racing clock.

programme.title: Divided

programme.desc: Smells Like Love : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they will put up with to find love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes never shaving or wearing deodorant and screaming and punching in her sleep.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: A Leg Up : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes refusing to date on weekends and wearing cologne on his ankles.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: You Gotta be Kitten Me! : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they will put up with for love. A dater chooses between women whose baggage includes spending half the day playing video games and sharing a toilet with her cat.

programme.title: 1 vs 100
programme.desc: Episode 16 : Carrie Ann Inaba hosts this game where one player ("The One") is pitted against "The Mob" of 100 people, with each trying to correctly answer a series of multiple-choice trivia questions for a potential jackpot of $50,000.

programme.title: Best Ever Trivia Show
programme.desc: Giraffe Kisses : Watch as three everyday people enter a fun-filled showdown with a panel of Trivia Experts in the hopes of joining their elite ranks. If they know enough about how to tell a giraffe's age they just might! Sherri Shepherd hosts.

programme.title: Best Ever Trivia Show
programme.desc: So Trustworthy : Watch as three everyday people enter a fun-filled showdown with a panel of Trivia Experts in the hopes of joining their elite ranks. If they know enough about the Skull and Bones secret society they just might! Sherri Shepherd hosts.

programme.title: Winsanity
programme.desc: Make it Rain : In this game show hosted by Donald Faison an environmental consultant must place numerical facts in order from lowest to highest to win prizes for himself and the audience. Will he breeze through to Total Winsanity or will he go home empty-handed?

programme.title: Winsanity
programme.desc: Sister Act : In this game show hosted by Donald Faison a contestant must place numerical facts in order from lowest to highest to win prizes for herself and members of the studio audience. Will she taste victory, or will another audience member take her place?

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: All About that Ace : Players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Minute To Win It
programme.desc: Team Mr. Mean and The Beauty Queen : Teams faces up to ten 60-second challenges for a chance to win up to $250,000 in this game show hosted by Apolo Anton Ohno.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: Model Friends vs. Dating Entertainers : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as co-workers from Southern California compete against best friends from Las Vegas to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: Sisters vs. Teachers : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as a pair of sisters compete against a set of teachers to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: Idiotest

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: Rapping Sister vs. Guy Friends : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as a pair of sisters compete against roommates to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: America Says

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Home of the Brave : In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Small Town Terror : In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sign Here : A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Metal Business : Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Stake-Out : Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Killer Impression : In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Frozen Assets : In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nursery Crimes : An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Squire's Riches : Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Broken Promises : When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Visibility Zero : In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Garden of Evil : When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Order Up : A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fate Date : In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Screen Pass : A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Root of All Evil : A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Filtered Out : In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Chief Suspect : The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Day the Music Died : Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of grunge singer Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before evidence collected by a prescient medical examiner could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Hand Delivered : In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Deadly Delivery : In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Cold Hearted : When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Tight Leash : How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sign of the Crime : In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Funeral Services : In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Kidnapping : In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Smiley Face : The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man — until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Journey to Justice : 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Without a Prayer : In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Burning Desire : Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Guarded Secrets : A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Home Evasion : In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bad Medicine : A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Fatal Choice : In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Strange Truth : In March 2003, Ramona Krotine left an office party and was never seen alive again. 24 hours later, she was found in the trunk of her car, beaten and shot to death. At first, police suspected a botched robbery but later believed her husband was to blame.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Last Chance : Attorneys work to get a death row inmate who confessed to a crime he didn't commit out of prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Murder Comes Knocking : In July 2004, Jarrod Davidson was shot to death outside his California apartment. Estranged from his ex-wife, Kelee, Jarrod had been seeking full custody of his daughter. After further investigation, Kelee’s parents were arrested for the murder of Jarrod.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The FBI Declassified: Dangerous Journey on the Silk Road : In 2011, the FBI became aware of “Silk Road”, an online black market website where users could buy and sell goods, including illegal drugs, weapons, fake IDs – even murders for hire were offered.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Walking Free : The story of David Camm, who was convicted in two murder trials -- each eventually overturned -- and was found not guilty in his third trial for the murder of his wife and two children.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In Too Deep : An examination of the story of Laura Hall, who was convicted and sent to prison for the crime of dismembering the body of Jennifer Cave in 2005.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Jeffrey MacDonald: Fight for Truth : A report on the 1970 murders of U.S. Army Doctor Jeffrey MacDonald’s pregnant wife and two daughters at their Fort Bragg home. Having served 25 years in prison for the murders, MacDonald still proclaims his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Preppy Killer : Robert Chambers speaks out after serving 15 years in prison for the 1986 murder of Jennifer Levin.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Amanda Knox: The Untold Story : The story of Amanda Knox, an American exchange student who was convicted, along with her Italian boyfriend, Raffaelle Sollecito, of murdering Amanda’s British roommate, Meredith Kercher in 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Ghosts of Greenwich : A report on the murder of 15-year-old Martha Moxley in Greenwich, Connecticut and the new developments in Kennedy family member Michael Skakel’s efforts to overturn his 2002 murder conviction of Moxley.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: Cause of Death
programme.desc: A young mother dies after attending a local dance music festival; after it's established she has taken ecstasy, the team must investigate whether the drug was the primary cause of her death or if other factors played a significant role.

programme.title: Cause of Death
programme.desc: Dr. Adeley and his team investigate the deaths of an elderly woman who was discovered lifeless while on a starlift and an apparently fit man who mysteriously fails to turn up for work.

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: The Blackout Ripper : Fred looks back over the life and crimes of RAF cadet Gordon Cummins; during the London Blitz of 1942, terror stalked the war torn streets.

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: The A6 Murder : One of the last people in the UK to be executed for murder. James Hanratty was hanged at Bedford Gaol on 4 April 1962, after being convicted of the A6 murder.

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: Jack the Ripper : Fred journeys back for the 125th anniversary of the Ripper murders to the East End of 1888 and speaks to Ripperologists about the continuing fascination behind the Jack the Ripper mystery.

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: Moors Murders : Fred looks at the Moors Murders, one of the most infamous murder cases of the 20th Century and speaks to an officer from the original investigation as well as Myra Hindley's Roman Catholic Priest.

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: Babes in the Woods : Fred Dinenage looks into the case of two children found dead in Epping Forest in 1970. For 26 years the public believed that they died of exposure, until a convicted child murderer, Ronald Jebson, called police from prison.

programme.title: Big Little Crimes
programme.desc: A tip leads authorities to uncover the U.K.'s largest case of food fraud; a police officer's instinct uncovers a conspiracy to commit fraud; a faulty taillight leads to high-level drug dealers.

programme.desc: A series of burglaries allow police to crack a drug dealing conspiracy; a consumer complaint brings down a national fraud; a jet-setting con-woman is brought to justice.

programme.desc: Deadly Host : Discover why the perfect life of Scott Rogers, a charismatic pastor in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, was just smoke and mirrors. Untangle a web of lies, deceptions, and heinous crimes that left two people dead and tore his family and community apart.

programme.title: Poisonous Liaisons

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Unwelcome Customer! Sanji's Food and Ghin's Debt! : Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Strongest Pirate Fleet! Commodore Don Krieg! : The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Protect Baratie! The Great Pirate, Red Foot Zeff! : Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman Zoro Falls At Sea! : The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Deadly Foot Technique Bursts Forth! Sanji vs. The Invincible Pearl! : The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zeff and Sanji's Dream! The Illusory All Blue! : Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Ghin! : As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: I Won't Die! Fierce Battle, Luffy vs. Krieg! : The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Conclusion of the Deadly Battle! A Spear of Blind Determination! : The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Set Sail! The Seafaring Cook Sets Off With Luffy! : With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Worst Man in the Eastern Seas! Fishman Pirate Arlong! : With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami – who’s on a collision course with a deadly foe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Witch of Cocoyashi Village! Arlong's Female Leader! : Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp Dead?! When is Luffy Going to Make Landfall?! : Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp Dead?! When is Luffy Going to Make Landfall?! : Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Everyone's Gathered! Usopp Speaks the Truth About Nami! : A fierce argument over where Nami’s loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing’s for sure – no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Untold Past! Female Warrior Bellemere! : Nami’s adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker’s younger days.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Survive! Mother Bellemere and Nami's Bond! : Nojiko continues the story of Nami’s younger days. Back in the present, Nami gets agonizingly close to a long time goal, but betrayal looms on the horizon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy Rises! Result of the Broken Promise! : Nezumi comes to confiscate Nami’s treasure, but who’s he working for? More importantly, who’s Nami working for, and what’s she gonna do with her booty?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy in Big Trouble! Fishmen vs. the Luffy Pirates! : The Straw Hats’ faith in Nami is restored, and now it’s time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy Submerged! Zoro vs. Hatchan the Octopus! : The Straw Hats and Arlong’s fishermen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Proud Warriors! Sanji and Usopp's Fierce Battles! : While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy at Full Power! Nami's Determination and the Straw Hat! : Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant Fishman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Explosion! Fishman Arlong's Fierce Assault From the Sea! : Arlong better watch his back-fins, because Captain Luffy knows about all the horrible things he did to Nami – and it makes his blood boil.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: End of the Fishman Empire! Nami's My Friend! : Something about Nami’s former prison gives Luffy an added burst of strength. He’s so moved by her terrible past that he vows to destroy all of Arlong Park!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Setting Out with a Smile! Farewell, Hometown Cocoyashi Village! : After a grueling fight, Luffy defeats Arlong and succeeds in destroying his headquarters. The merry marauders enjoy the fruits of victory while Nami makes peace with her turbulent past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Protect Baratie! The Great Pirate, Red Foot Zeff! : Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman Zoro Falls At Sea! : The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Deadly Foot Technique Bursts Forth! Sanji vs. The Invincible Pearl! : The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zeff and Sanji's Dream! The Illusory All Blue! : Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Ghin! : As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Louder! : Louder!: What are we going to do? Cockledoodledoo! Dora and Boots help their friend, Red Rooster, get to the Highest Hill so he can wake up the Sun. Along the way we practice making lots of noise.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Roberto The Robot : Roberto The Robot: Dora and Boots meet Roberto, a very cool robot with a tool belt, flashing lights, stretching powers and super strength. But Roberto's lost!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Potato : The Big Potato: Benny the Bull finds a magic wand and turns himself into a potato by mistake. Oh no! It's up to Dora and Boots to bring their potato friend back to the Young Wizard so that he can change Benny back into a bull again.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Journey To The Purple Planet : Journey To The Purple Planet: Blast into outer space as Dora and Boots set off to bring stranded space creatures back home to the Purple Planet. Take a wild ride on a rocketship, travel through the Milky Way, and catch a ride on a comet.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Lost City : The Lost City: Where do toys go when they're lost? To the Lost City! But the Lost City is really hard to find. Dora and Boots are on an educational, Indiana Jones-like adventure as they race through the Number Pyramid and the Jumbled Jungle.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Meet Diego! : Meet Diego!: Meet Diego, Dora's super cool cousin. Diego works at the Animal Rescue Center. He can make animal noises and talk to wild animals!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Save The Puppies : Save The Puppies: Woof! Woof! Dora and Boots have a new video game called "Save the Puppies." A mean dogcatcher has locked up all the puppies in the Doggie Cages. To save them, Dora and Boots super jump into the video game.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: ¡Por Favor! : ¡Por Favor!: Dora and Boots read a fairy tale about a young kinkajou - a cute and cuddly forest creature - who is destined to be king. But the kinkajou loses his crown because he doesn't know the magic words, "por favor."

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Dino : Baby Dino: Dora, Boots and Diego need to bring a giant baby dinosaur home to his mommy at Dino Island. It's a prehistoric adventure through a land of dinosaurs. Tiptoe past a T-Rex, meet a Compsagnathus - the world's smallest dinosaur.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots' Special Day : Boots' Special Day: Today, Boots gets to do anything he wants, because it's his special day! Un día especial. Boots most favorite thing in the whole world is to visit his daddy at work.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: To The South Pole : To The South Pole: Rescue Truck arrives at Diego's Animal Center to deliver a cute, little animal that's really lost: a penguin! It's up to Dora, Boots and Diego to bring Pingüino all the way back home to the South Pole.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves The Game : Dora Saves The Game: Dora's cousin Daisy is playing in a big soccer game that's showing on TV. But Daisy's team is short a player. Daisy appeals to Dora to come play on her team and save the game. Run, Dora, run!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: What Happens Next? : What Happens Next?: What comes after "The End"? Dora and Boots are finishing a fairy tale, and reach the end of the story. They wonder what happens next.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Rescue, Rescue, Rescue : Rescue, Rescue, Rescue: Oh no! Three of our friends are in trouble. Baby Jaguar is stuck in a tree, Isa is stuck in a big sand hole, and Benny is stuck in his balloon on top of the Gooey Geyser. Who do we have to rescue first?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Shy Rainbow : Dora and Boots are hiking on Rainbow Rock when they come across a shy rainbow, Arco Iris, hiding behind a waterfall.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Crab : Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach when all of a sudden they hear a call for help. It's a baby crab stuck in a net!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Swiper the Explorer : Dora and Boots are playing catch when they discover a lost Baby Fox. And he wants his mommy! Just then, Swiper shows up to swipe Boots' superball.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Jack-in-the-Box : Dora's twin brother and sister have been sick and she wants to buy them a present to cheer them up. Way up on a toy store shelf, she finds a dusty Jack-in-the-Box.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bark, Bark to Play Park : It's Twins Day and everyone's getting ready for the big Twins Day Party at Play Park! Dora even has a surprise for her puppy Perrito. He has a twin too -- a long-lost puppy brother he hasn't seen since they were babies.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves Three Kings Day : "Happy Three Kings Day!" Dora, Boots, and Diego are dressed up as kings for the big Three Kings Day party. They'll be bringing a horse, a camel, and an elephant to carry the presents, and treats for the party, but Swiper scares the animals away!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Isa's Unicorn Flowers : Dora and Isa are planting Isa's special unicorn flowers when suddenly a baby unicorn, Unicornio, rides in on a Rainbow. He's thrilled to see Isa's beautiful flowers because they're his Mami's favorite.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Benny's Big Race : Benny is so excited – it's his first time in the Big Go-Cart Race, where everyone races in homemade go-carts! But when the whistle blows, Benny's cart backfires and falls to pieces. But Dora and Boots won't let him give up.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: First Day of School : Boots and Tico are really excited because it's their first day of school ever -- and in their new school, they'll learn in English and Spanish!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Backpack Parade : Backpack, Backpack, yeah!!! Today's the Backpack Parade, where everyone dresses up their backpacks in different costumes. Backpack is super excited 'cause this year she gets to lead the parade with her song.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bouncy Boots : "Special delivery for Boots the monkey!" Boots' favorite boots are back from the Shoe Shop, but when he tries them on, he starts to bounce, bounce, bounce. These aren't his boots -- these are bouncy boots.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Mayan Adventure : Dora reads us a Mayan story about twin brothers who were amazing ballplayers. A long time ago in a Mayan Kingdom, there was a big Ball Game Championship.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves the Three Little Piggies : Dora and Boots are reading their favorite story, "The Three Little Pigs" when suddenly we hear the Piggies calling out for help. Their brick house is missing some bricks and the Big Bad Wolf is going to blow it down!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's Magic Show : ABRACADABRA! The Big Red Chicken's putting on a magic show for all of his friends. With an "abracadabra," he pulls a rabbit out of his hat, but when it's time to make the bunny disappear, it doesn't work!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Benny's Treasure : It's Junk Day and Benny's showing Dora and Boots his wagon of cool junk. But when the junk truck accidentally takes Backpack and Map off to the junkyard, it's up to Dora, Boots, Benny and his wagon of stuff to rescue them!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Super Babies' Dream Adventure : It's naptime for the twins and Dora has a special Super Babies naptime story. Once upon a time, the Super Babies were getting ready for their nap but the Dream Fairy never showed up because she was still asleep!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Pirate Treasure Hunt : Pirate Piggy really wants to be in the big Pirate Treasure Hunt, but his Piggies got tummyaches. He needs at least 3 mates to help him find the sunken treasure. Dora, Boots, and L'il Piggy will be his pirate mates -- yay!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Helps the Birthday Wizzle : Dora reads a story about a Wizzle who could grant wishes with his magic wand. On his birthday, it's his turn to make a wish but the wand gets blown away by the wind. Dora needs your help to save the Wizzle's magic wand!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots' Banana Wish : Dora and Boots are at an amusement park where they have a special wishing machine. Boots makes a wish: "I wish that when I say, 'bananas,' I get bananas." With a "boing," a bunch of bananas falls down on Boots.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Blow Out : Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Kill Zone : MacGyver battles an eccentric scientist whose bizarre biological experiments go out of control and threaten the environment.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: The Odd Triple : MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested in France after becoming unwitting accomplices in an international jewel heist.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Flash of Color, Flash of Death : An opal smuggler and killer, Jeff Hobbs, is set up by a glamorous Eurasian woman who clears the way for her accomplices to enter a Honolulu jewelry store and rob him and the jeweler of a fortune in opals.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A Bullet for El Diablo : Maria Ramos, the daughter of a despised Latin American dictator, is kidnapped near her University of Hawaii dormitory, and her father arrives in Honolulu within hours to oversee plans for her rescue.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The Finishing Touch : The murder of a printer and the discovery of a forged municipal bond send McGarrett to a documents expert for help in investigating a destructive ring of forgeries of government securities.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Anybody Can Build a Bomb : Lew Ayres guest stars as Dr. Elias Haig, a nuclear physicist caught up in a brazen extortion scheme. The conspirators demand $100,000,000 cash from the government in exchange for their assurance not to blow up a portion of Honolulu with an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Try To Die on Time : Comedian Jack Carter makes a rare television dramatic appearance when he guest stars as gambler Harry Foxton, the central figure in a macabre $240,000 lottery based on the projected hour of his death.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: The Negotiator : MacGyver is marked for death after stopping the construction of a proposed marina and unknowingly falls in love with the hired killer sent to stop him.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: The Spoilers (Aka "Earthquake") : MacGyver comes to the rescue of a mountain man who has been framed for murder after agreeing to testify against a chemical company that is illegally disposing of hazardous materials in nearby streams.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Mask of the Wolf : MacGyver and Jack Dalton come to the rescue of an Indian who is kidnapped by fortune hunters seeking the secret location of a legendary mask.

programme.title: MacGyver
