programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ultimate Home Invasion : Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Misbehaving Moms? : Leah says mom Dora appears sweet but she's actually a narcissist, hypochondriac, drama queen & liar. Can this mother-daughter find common ground and rebuild? Plus Carrie says mom Paula, 61, has been meeting strangers online having sex. Dr. Phil weighs in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Broken Bones, Broken Hearts, Broken Engagements? : Brittany says boyfriend Tim is evil, abusive & unfaithful. Tim admits that he can't control his rage & choked Brittany while holding their 6-month-old daughter & says he fears he'll hurt the baby next. Tim confesses to cheating with both men and women.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My In-Laws Tried To Kill Me : Ramon’s former in-laws tried to murder him, and he now finds himself in a bitter custody battle with his ex-wife. Plus, multiple women claim they were sexually assaulted by a police officer in San Diego. How can victims move on from painful trauma?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Young, Innocent, And Held Captive : Two survivors of abduction, Katie Beers and Sarah Maynard, share their stories in exclusive interviews with Dr. Phil. How did they survive their horrifying ordeals?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil Visits Monster-In-Law Khalood : When Monster-In-Law Khalood last met with Dr. Phil, she wanted her lazy kids out of her house and invited Dr. Phil to her home to prove her claims. Dr. Phil takes Khalood up on her offer, and gets a firsthand look at what’s going on behind closed doors!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Lohans : Actress Lindsay Lohan's mom, Dina, has been accused of being a bad mom, to riding the coattails of her daughter. Dina sets the record straight & reveals details inside her marriage to Michael. Plus, meet a woman who says Michael is her child's father.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In Love And Illegal : Thirty-year-old mom of four, Melissa Dilan-Hernandez, made headlines when arrested and charged with having sex with her 17-year-old fiancé, T.J. The couple sits down with Dr. Phil to justify their relationship. Plus, does T.J.'s father approve?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shocking Accusations: Abused Wife Or Abused Husband? : Marie says husband Ron has a violent temper & she fears her safety & of their 4-yr-old. She alleges Ron pushed her down the stairs & wrote "kill" on a bathroom mirror. Ron says Marie mixes her meds with alcohol. Dr. Phil cameras record the chaos at home.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Hypochondriac, High Drama, Or Really Sick: Saving Shemida Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil continues conversation with Shemida and her sister, Dana, who says Shemida’s 70-plus diagnoses are tearing the family apart. Dr. Phil unites this family in an effort to find answers. Is Shemida really sick, or is she addicted to attention? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Student And The Professor: Is One Stalking The Other : Dr. Phil tries to unravel the truth in a toxic relationship between a student and a professor. Did they cross the line? Will they take responsibility for their roles in this ill-fated acquaintance?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Time Is Running Out For Prison-Bound Dad: Did His Wife Blackmail Him Into Embezzling $300,000 : An emotional intervention on Dr. Phil's stage: Siblings Sarah and PJ say for the past two years their mom, Kim, chose alcohol and pills over her four children. With father Pete headed to prison for mail fraud in a few weeks, the family is falling apart.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Ex Is Evil: I Want To See My Kids : Brad says he is in a bitter custody battle with ex Kimberly, who's kept him from seeing their three kids. Kimberly says Brad is unstable & irresponsible and until he cleans up his act, he can't see their kids. Can these exes learn to peacefully co-parent?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: I Am The Outcast Of My Family And They Threw Me Away Like Trash! : Marissa, 22, says her family treated her like an outcast in childhood & she later began working as an escort to make ends meet. Marissa faces family for the first time in 3 years on Dr. Phil's stage. Did they indeed reject her & is there hope for repair?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Our Son Was Making Millions, But Is Now Living In Our Garage With His Girlfriend : Mike and Vicki say their 37-year-old son, Ryan, once made millions running a successful real estate company, but for the past three months, he has been living in their garage with his 24-year-old girlfriend, Rachel. Dr. Phil asks Ryan tough questions.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Blacklisted By Mom: Can We Speak To Our Dad Before He Dies : Four adult siblings say they've been blacklisted by their mother from seeing their dying father, a claim their mother vehemently denies. Emotions run high when this fractured family comes together on Dr. Phil’s stage. Can they put an end to the fighting?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From Top TV Newcaster To Drunken Mom : Christi says she was an Emmy-winning TV news reporter at the top of her career, but now her struggle with alcohol has left her jobless, homeless and estranged from her two adult daughters. Christi faces her girls for the first time in more than two years.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Wife Or My Girlfriend, Dr. Phil, You Decide : Melvin says he is torn between his wife of eight years, Rachel, and his girlfriend of two years, Chantelle, and he wants Dr. Phil to help decide whom he should choose. When the women meet face to face for the first time, does Dr. Phil help him choose?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Daughter On The Brink: Did Mom Push Her Over The Edge? : Dana says daughter Melanie, 23, is a drug abuser whose behavior is ripping apart their peaceful family. Melanie admits to experimenting with drugs but says she's not addicted & she blames her mom for pushing her buttons and causing her to lose her cool.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Adoption Nightmare: I Want My Baby Back : Kristen says two years ago she was manipulated into placing her newborn for adoption with her ex-stepfather Adam and his new wife, Stacy, who Kristen says promised she could remain in the child's life. Adam & Stacy insist they did everything by the book.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Loved-up Grant and Tayla return from the Hideaway and Sophie delivers shock news that two boys will be dumped from the Villa.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The fallout from the previous week's shock dumping sends emotions running high through the Villa. Meanwhile, new arrival Teddy goes on some dates and ends up causing some trouble.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Recoupling Ceremony : Even Sophie is shocked as the results of the most controversial recoupling yet shakes things up.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Tayla seethes as Cassidy and Grant get closer in the Yoga Challenge whilst the two newest girls to land in Paradise, Shelby and Amelia, ignite competition in the villa.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: A surprise Recoupling leaves two girls single and at risk of being dumped off the island.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Either Cassidy or Mac will be dumped and Australia needs to decide who will be sent home.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love blossoms around the Villa, but a surprise recoupling ceremony sends one Islander home.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The Final : The Islanders have spent six weeks in a villa in Mallorca, Spain, and now it is time to find out who is the winning couple as voted by viewers. The winning couple is given £50,000 to start their new lives together.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The boys and girls meet for the first time, and they waste no time in getting to know each other. Cartier and Gerard split off from a villa tour to get to know each other. Maurice and Jessie share a moment, while and Matthew and Vanessa cuddle up.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Eoghan gets tongues wagging around the villa, and things take an interesting turn when he gets a text message telling him he has 24-hours to steal the heart of one of the girls. Adam kicks off when he overhears a conversation about him.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Eoghan pulls Cartier aside to check she's okay after his decision and Maurice tries his luck with Cynthia. Eoghan and Jessie share a night together, while Cynthia gets a text, and the Excess Baggage challenge leads to some very unhappy housemates.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Anna and Phoebe makes waves as soon as they arrive in the villa. Phoebe admits she's attracted to Cassie. Both Anna and Phoebe get a date with Adam. Jessie plants a big kiss on Eoghan. Matt kicks off and confronts Sam.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Eoghan is stuck in a love triangle between Jessie and Anna, and can't make up his mind. Darts leads to a Phoebe and Cassie sharing a very intimate moment. Gerard and Anna get to know each other more. Cartier is enjoying spending time with Adam.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Jessie and Eoghan revel in their happiness together, while Adam and Cartier share an intimate moment. Cynthia learns some unpleasant truths about Maurice.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The residents of the villa welcome a pair of bombshell twins. It spells double trouble for one newly formed couple.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The twins send hearts racing during a raunchy strip tease in the villa. Plus, Cartier and Adam share a spark on their first date.

programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Dangerous Game : A deputy sheriff dies while chasing a car carrying two SEALs in a Navy exercise. The driver stands trial for negligent homicide. Bud goes home, the new SecNav takes office, and Harm takes Meredith for a thrilling flight.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: In Thin Air : A Radar Intercept Officer dies of hypoxia, traced to contaminated oxygen. Mac prosecutes the PO apparently at fault; Harm makes a poor defense and Sturgis takes over. Harm learns the truth eventually. Bud resents Harriet's protectiveness.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Need to Know : As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Friendly Fire : A Navy pilot drops a bomb on a British position, killing three soldiers and injuring others. In a court-martial he faces charges of involuntary homicide and dereliction of duty. Mac and Bud prosecute, Sturgis defends, and Harm presides.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The One That Got Away : A Marine faces a charge of dereliction after becoming lost in Iraq in a sandstorm; Sturgis prosecutes, and Mac defends. Harm flies again for the CIA, aboard a spy plane for a training hop, which turns into a real mission over North Korea.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Posse Comitatus : A Marine helo gunship intervenes during a standoff at a ranch; Mac prosecutes the pilot, and Harm defends. Bud investigates a Naval Reserve physician who, a conscientious objector, has received his medical education at Navy expense.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Good Intentions : Mac must defend a petty officer accused of murdering a female officer, but the man has no memory of the night in question, while a Navy SEAL who purchased nerve gas needs Bud's help to avoid prison.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: This Just In from Baghdad : MGen. Creswell has taken charge. An official of the DoD has died in Iraq; a Marine staff sergeant goes on trial for involuntary manslaughter by culpable negligence; Harm prosecutes, and Mac defends. Officers take partial responsibility.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Dream Team : A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Pilot, Part 1 & 2 : A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Shadow : A civilian tech rep aboard a submarine seizes control of an experimental torpedo after its launch during an exercise

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Desert Son : Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Déjà vu (AKA Soldier of Love) : Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Pilot Error : Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: War Cries : In Lima, Peru, while a boy sneaks into the US embassy at night, a Marine guard stops him.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Brig Break : A sailor has stolen two Stinger missiles from a base. Harm and Meg investigate.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Scimitar : Two Marines in a Humvee mistakenly drive into Iraq; an Iraqi detail intercepts them, kills one, and captures the other.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Mother : Akhos Laos, a former black ops agent originally recruited and trained by Hetty Lange, returns to seek revenge on Hetty for the life she introduced him to.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Answers : The team investigates the theft of a computer virus; Callen and Sam consider their future at the agency; Kensi and Deeks discuss having children; Eric and Nell analyze the impact of Eric's undercover assignment on their relationship.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Groundwork : CIA Officer Veronica Stephens asks the team for help when an agricultural engineer Hetty asked her to bring to the United States disappears.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: High Society : After a rise in deaths caused by black market opioid use, the NCIS team links the street drug to funding for terrorist activities.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Commitment Issues : The NCIS team investigates the murder of a Naval warfare engineer at a spoken poetry event; Callen asks Nell to assist him in a worldwide search for Anna's whereabouts.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Circle : Anna Kolcheck returns to warn Callen that he is in danger and he must now work with an archenemy to stop an underground trafficking ring.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Alsiyadun : Agents in Los Angeles' Office of Special Projects team track criminals who threaten national security.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Watch Over Me : An FBI agent is killed while trying to track the location of an undercover agent. Now, NCIS must find the missing agent before the criminals he was investigating do.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Love Kills : When the team investigate the murder of a man about to reveal the source of a counterfeiting operation, an old acquaintance becomes their prime suspect and reveals the true reason for her return; Deeks struggles during training.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Fait Accompli : An organized crime leader tries to buy stolen defense technology; Deeks is kicked out of NCIS training only to find that Hetty has a life-changing surprise for him.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Russia, Russia, Russia : When Callen goes to the National Counterterrorism Center on the pretext of interrogating a Russian asset from the crashed plane case he investigated months earlier, the tables are turned and he is accused of being a Russian agent.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Can’t Take My Eyes Off You : As Nell keeps Callen in the dark about the team's search for Katya, Callen tracks down the person tailing him in a remote location teeming with Russians.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Red Rover, Red Rover : To rescue Joelle from further torture by the Russians, Callen and the team must offer up Anna as bait to Katya; Callen finally discovers who accused him of being a Russian spy.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Noble Maidens : Callen and the rest of the team go all-out to rescue Anna. But even if Anna is found, there is no guarantee she and Callen will have a future.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Imposter Syndrome : NCIS obtains a hard drive containing a realistic deep fake video of a deceased terrorist and must retrieve the dangerous technology behind it; communications are hijacked during their mission.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Signs Of Change : Agents in Los Angeles' Office of Special Projects team track criminals who threaten national security.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Through The Looking Glass : When a naval intelligence officer is tortured and murdered, NCIS discovers that CIA operatives are being killed in the same way

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Tale Of Two Igors : Deeks is kidnapped by an associate of Kirkin's who is in need of his help; NCIS investigates the shooting of a militarized dolphin equipped with a Russian microchip; Beale makes Nell an interesting offer.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Subject 17 : While Callen suspects Hetty of keeping secrets about his past and Joelle surfaces in her quest to capture Katya, NCIS must track down an informant whose life is in danger.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Sue Casa, His Casa : Bud's new driver's license portends bumper cars on the roadway. When bud t-bones a Mercedes, Al sees an opportunity to clean up in court. At least he has hope. Losing his lawsuit hurt but what he goes through to pay off the settlement is truly painful.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Unnatural : Al is cut from the neighborhood softball team just before the big game. When his all-star replacement is knocked out in the last inning, however, his team and family have to come crawling back.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Dance Show : Peggy goes out dancing with Marcy and becomes taken with a handsome man-about-town named Andy. At home, however, Al gets confronted by Andy's wife, Pete.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kelly Bounces Back : Now an aspiring model, Kelly invents a maneuver called "The Bundy Bounce" for her first audition as spokesperson for the new Allente car.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Married…with Aliens : After Al returns home from work with a bump on the head, he sees (or thinks he sees) six little green aliens coming down to Earth and stealing his smelly socks to use as fuel for their spaceships.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Wabbit Season : Al decides to grow a vegetable garden but soon faces off against an all-out war with a rabbit who steals his carrots and other vegetables.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Do Ya Think I'm Sexy : When Al moves a sofa off a neighbor's lawn without a shirt on, he unexpectedly gains a reputation as a "stud" among the neighborhood women.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: One Down, Two to Go : Tired of Al escorting her dates out through the doorway, "grown-up" Kelly gets her own apartment.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy Turns 300 : Al tries to ditch Peggy on her birthday until she catches him in the act and tags along with the family.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy Made a Little Lamb : Peggy tries to earn her G.E.D. with Kelly in night school.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Raingirl : Kelly chooses to be a weather girl rather than go to school which makes the Bundy's happy since she'll be making more money than Al.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Agony of De-Feet : After being plagued by nightmares of feet a beautiful woman asks Al to judge a contest at Gary's, whose contestants she, "could never compete with." Meanwhile, Kelly tricks Marcy and Bud into thinking they've slept together.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Yard Sale : Peggy will buy anything at a yard sale, so when she brings home a boar's head, there's no more room in the garage to put it. So, Al decides enough is enough and he decides to have his own yard sale, despite Peggy's protests.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: We'll Follow the Sun : The Bundys decide to go for a drive--on Labor Day. They spend the better part of the holiday sitting in traffic, arguing with one another, and picking fights with neighboring motorists.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al…with Kelly : Al and Kelly feign illness to avoid going to Wanker County with Peg and Bud. Al looks forward to his quiet and peaceful weekend until Kelly gets sick.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Look Who's Barking : Told from the point of view of Buck, he runs away from the house feeling neglected. Behind a diner, he picks up a female dog, whom he brings home. He quickly regrets it, as the new dog gets all the attention from Bud and Kelly.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: A Man's Castle : Peg takes an interior design course and her first assignment is to redecorate one room in her house. Unfortunately for Al, she chooses his spare bathroom.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: All Night Security Dude : When a second-floor aerobics studio, full of terribly overweight women, collapses into the shoe store, Al is laid off while the store is being repaired. Al then gets a night job as a security guard at his old high school, Polk High.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Oldies but Young 'Uns : Al is haunted by a tune on the radio he can hum but not name, and he gets no help from Peggy or the D'Arcy's.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Weenie Tot Lovers & Other Strangers : Al forgoes giving money to Bud for a class trip to Washington DC in order to give to Kelly who's going to an audition for the Miss Weenie Tot spokesperson. When Kelly lands the spot, Al gets a year's supply of his favorite mock food: Weenie Tots.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kids! Wadaya Gonna Do? : Al and Peggy go over to watch a video at Marcy and Jefferson's house and proceed to take over the place.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Top of the Heap : Al Bundy's childhood pal, Charlie Verducci, and the guy's dim-witted son Vinnie attend a high society fundraiser in this pilot for the short-lived TV series, 'Top of the Heap.'

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: You Better Shop Around - Pt 1 : Al cannot afford to buy an air conditioner for the hot summer. After an attempt to install an old experimental model, (which results in a neighborhood blackout) Al moves his family into the local supermarket.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: You Better Shop Around - Pt 2 : The Bundys and Darcys shop 'til they drop to see who will win $1000 in groceries. Needless to say, Marquis of Queensbury rules will not apply.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Route 666 - Pt 1 : While on their way to Los Angeles for a "Shoe Convention," the Bundy's car breaks down in the small town of Lucifer, New Mexico where they meet an old prospector who gives them a map to an old gold mine in the area in exchange for their car.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Route 666 - Pt 2 : Al, Peggy, Kelly, Bud, Jefferson, and Marcy find the gold mine in the desert. Al discovers the first gold nugget and everyone but the feeble-minded Kelly winds up with a bag full of gold.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Buck the Stud : A man offers the Bundy's $10,000 if Buck will breed with his champion dog, Lady Bird. So, Al has to coach Buck into knowing the varieties of breeding with other dogs the proper way.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: And Baby Makes Money : After Al's bachelor uncle dies, he leaves $500,000 to the first of his relatives to produce a newborn baby named after him. Al overcomes his usual aversion to sex with Peg.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Married…with Who : After a drinking binge at a bankers party, Marcy reveals herself to be married to a mysterious hunk named Jefferson D'Arcy, whom Al finds out to be a gigolo and con artist.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Godfather : Al becomes the boss of the neighborhood after Kelly starts dating an influential city councilman.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Look Who's Barking : Told from the point of view of Buck, he runs away from the house feeling neglected. Behind a diner, he picks up a female dog, whom he brings home. He quickly regrets it, as the new dog gets all the attention from Bud and Kelly.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Oldies but Young 'Uns : Al is haunted by a tune on the radio he can hum but not name, and he gets no help from Peggy or the D'Arcy's.

When Kelly lands the spot, Al gets a year's supply of his favorite mock food: Weenie Tots.

programme.title: Pluto Classic Movie Westerns
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Bells Of Capistrano
programme.desc: A feud between rodeo companies accelerates when both want Gene Autry, as a crowd-drawing added attraction. This film features Gene singing five hits, including "In Old Capistrano" and "Forgive Me."

programme.title: Navajo Joe
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds, Aldo Sambrell and Fernando Rey star in this lusty, gutsy action western about a fearless Indian with a relentless vendetta against the band of outlaws that killed his people. Directed by Spaghetti Western legend Sergio Corbucci.

programme.title: Blue Canadian Rockies
programme.desc: Gene Autry encounters mayhem on a dude ranch in the heart of timber country. When a Mountie is murdered, Gene and Pat Buttram must find the real culprit and bring peace to the Blue Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Silver Canyon
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram are sent by the cavalry to bring in raiders who are interfering with supply lines. Gene traces them to a small Army outpost where the outlaws set out to ravage the town.

programme.title: In Old Monterey
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to persuade farmers to sell their land for a military proving ground. Gene discovers that mine owners are stirring up the ranchers to con the government to pay more for their land.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: Archie (Gregory Peck) and his partner, Billy (Desi Arnaz, Jr.) are bandits by trade, staging daring robberies throughout the American frontier. But when their latest heist takes a deadly turn, they are pursued by a ruthless marshal (Jack Warden).

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Sons Of New Mexico
programme.desc: Gene Autry becomes the guardian of a wayward boy who is in debt. Gene sends him to the New Mexico Military Institute, where he falls in with bad companions and is framed for a murder of an ex-jockey.

programme.title: Red River Valley
programme.desc: Cowhand Gene Autry and his partner, Frog Millhouse, help Arizona cattlemen who are trying to build a dam that will bring water to their parched lands. Unscrupulous businessmen attempt to hinder these plans for their own profit.

programme.title: Blue Montana Skies
programme.desc: Gene Autry heads North to apprehend fur smugglers plundering the trappers' pelts, and then return to the U.S. When the trail leads to the H-H dude ranch owned by a beautiful gal, the action heats up.

programme.title: Ride, Tenderfoot, Ride
programme.desc: Gene Autry inherits and runs a meat packing company. To get Gene to sell, the lady owner of a rival company starts a feud to derail Gene, who tries to recover by using rallies, parades, and bands.

programme.title: Greaser's Palace
programme.desc: A parable based on the life of Christ. This ain't your father's Bible story, full of references about the destruction of the world through massive constipation and a New Mexican setting.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Rage Against the Machine : When Dan gets injured on the job covering D.J.'s vending machine route, the choice to sue the company could lead to D.J. getting fired. Meanwhile, Jackie is appalled when Becky seeks life coaching from her nemesis.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Don't Shoot the Piano Teacher : When Ben offers Mark free piano lessons, Darlene finds this as an opportunity to test his parenting skills. Meanwhile, Jackie throws Becky a baby shower, and Emilio continues his efforts to be part of the baby's life.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: We Contine to Truck : As Darlene grapples with a life-changing offer from Ben, an unexpected conversation with David turns her world even more upside down. Relationship problems lead Jackie to the bottom of the bottle at the last place she remembers being truly happy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Preemies, Weed and Infidelity : After Emilio's deportation, Jackie takes on a paternal role crafting a birth plan for Becky; Darlene navigates a love triangle with David and Ben; Harris faces her own dilemma.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Kiss Is Just a Kiss : Darlene struggles to decide between David and Ben; Becky begins to doubt herself as a mom; Mark gets in trouble at school when a picture of him and his boyfriend kissing goes viral.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Preemie Monologues : Harris confronts Darlene's lifestyle; Jackie meddles in others' affairs to evade her own issues; Becky struggles with the expenses of parenthood, her family lends support.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Lanford…Lanford : Becky's bartending gig worries Dan; Darlene weighs David versus Ben; Harris' new pal, Odessa, spells trouble.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Nightmare on Lunch Box Street : Jackie's Halloween is a nightmare when she discovers a dark secret; Mary's upset over assumptions about her adoption; Darlene juggles love interests.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Tempest in a Stew Pot : Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility among the three.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Slappy Holidays : Thanksgiving chaos erupts as Dan gathers the family; tensions rise over the Lunch Box; Harris surprises everyone with a bold move.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Lanford, Tiolet of Sin : Jackie's decision unites family and community; Becky takes on a late-night job; Darlene goes to extremes to repair her bond with Harris.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Smoking Penguins and Santa on Santa Action : Dan is disappointed when everyone but Becky forgets about his birthday; Darlene faces another issue; Dan excludes Jackie from the family Christmas Santa photo for mistreating Louis.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Throwing a Christian to a Bear : The Conners resist Becky's Packers fan boyfriend; Dan emphasizes family loyalty to the Bears to Mark; Ben and Darlene seek a loan for their magazine.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Mud Turtles, A Good Steak and One Man in a Tub : Becky suspects Jackie's new supplier friend; Darlene's excitement over Harris's college acceptance is challenged by another offer; Dan faces an embarrassing predicament.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Live from Lanford : The Conners debate voting reasons; Louise's offer threatens to take her from Lanford, prompting family intervention in Dan's relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jeoparde, Sobriete, and Infidelite : Darlene makes a decision about her trip to Hawaii, leading to a heated encounter with Barb; Becky gives a presentation on addiction to Mark's class.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Two Proposals, a Homecoming and a Bear : Two proposals bring big changes to the Conner family; Jackie uses her Jeopardy infamy to her advantage.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Trucking Live in Front of a Fully Vaccinated Studio Audience : The Conners continue to deal with the pandemic while navigating breakups and newfound sobriety, all while planning an upcoming wedding.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Education, Corruption and Damnation : After Ben declines Darlene's proposal, she starts to ponder why she tends to be so negative in life, prompting her to start a journey of self-discovery, which leads to Pastor Phil.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Sober Sex, Plastic Silverware and Losing My Religion : Part of Becky's recovery program mandates she make amends with people she has lied to over the years, leading her to meet up again with a former high school friend; Darlene visits with Pastor Phil; Louise continues planning her wedding.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Wedding of Dan and Louise : It's Dan and Louise's wedding day, but it's a far-from-perfect walk down the aisle, especially when a weather report forecasts that a tornado is headed for Lanford creating chaos and surprises.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Peter Pan, The Backup Plan, Adventures in Babysitting and A River Runs Through It : The Conner home is decked out for Halloween, despite the leak in the roof that forces Dan and Louise to cancel their honeymoon; Becky surprises the newlyweds and takes them on a virtual adventure around the world.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Young Love, Old Love and Take This Job and Shove It : Darlene worries about Mark making friends at his new school; Mark turns to Ben for personal advice; Becky finds herself thriving in college and starts thinking about her future plans.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Let's All Push Our Hands Together For the Stew Train and The Conners Furniture : Jackie devises an offbeat plan to serve the customers at The Lunch Box, it's anything but smooth; Dan begins to sell furniture to make room for his new bride and her things.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Yard Sale, Phone Fail and a College Betrayal : As Louise starts to move into the Conner home, Dan decides to sell the furniture set he bought for Roseanne when they were first married; he soon finds parting with the furniture harder than he thought it would be.

programme.title: The Conners

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Espeon, Not Included : In Ecruteak City, our heroes meet up with their friend Sakura and her newly evolved Espeon. Sakura and her sisters are preparing for a dance competition, but Team Rocket is lurking in the wings, hoping to steal their Pokémon…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: For Ho-Oh The Bells Toll : When our heroes investigate a sudden pealing of bells, they discover that the Crystal Bells, which are said to ring only when the Legendary Pokémon Ho-Oh returns, are missing! The researcher Eusine seems to know something…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Extreme Pokémon : When Ash runs into his old rival Gary preparing to enter his Arcanine in a race, he decides to compete as well! But first, he’ll have to chase Team Rocket away from the Pokémon Day Care.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: An Egg-Sighting Adventure : When the Pokémon Egg given to Ash goes missing, our heroes call on the help of a hapless Officer Jenny. It isn't long before they realize that if they want the Egg back, they'll have to find it themselves!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Hatching A Plan : The moment has finally come: a Phanpy has hatched from Ash's Pokémon Egg! The little Pokémon is full of energy and soon charging off...with our heroes and Team Rocket in tow!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Dues And Don'ts : Jessie, James, and Meowth take time to lick their wounds and dream of stealing Pikachu for the glory of Team Rocket. After a chance meeting with a Team Rocket scout, it seems these dreams are blasting off before their eyes!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Just Waiting On A Friend : When thick fog interrupts our heroes' journey, a girl and her Ninetales invite them to rest at a nearby mansion...where Brock and their host fall into a romance that could turn out to be ghostly!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A Tyrogue Full Of Trouble : Near Mt. Mortar, our heroes run into a Trainer who is trying to curb a Tyrogue's wild ways. But when Team Rocket gets involved, will they be able to save the troublesome Tyrogue from the villains' clutches?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Xatu The Future : Our heroes meet a young girl watching over a group of Xatu, whose psychic powers let them predict the future of a local village. When the villagers begin doubting their warnings, can the Xatu prove the truth of their visions?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Talkin' 'Bout An Evolution : Reaching the Lake of Rage, Pikachu and Togepi begin to feel sick, and our heroes are attacked by an enraged red Gyarados. When Team Rocket appears on the scene, things look a lot more dangerous for Ash and friends…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Rage Of Innocence : Things look bad for our heroes, who have been captured by Team Rocket at the Lake of Rage. With the fate of the world's Pokémon at stake, can Ash rise to the occasion and save the day?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: As Cold As Pryce : Finally reaching Mahogany Town, Ash is warming up for his next Gym battle. But after getting the cold shoulder from Gym Leader Pryce, can our hero convince his frosty opponent to give him a chance?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Nice Pryce, Baby : Pryce and Ash are about to clash in a cold contest in the Mahogany Town Gym. Will Ash be able to show what he and his Pokémon are made of and earn his seventh Johto region Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Whichever Way The Wind Blows : Our heroes encounter battling groups of Bellossom and Vileplume, who have only recently evolved. As each group fights with increasing number and intensity, can our heroes put an end to the quarrelling?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Some Like It Hot : The heat is rising in our heroes' journey when Misty and her Water-type Pokémon go head to head with a willful Fire-type Trainer!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Hocus Pokémon : Ash and the gang bump into a Pokémon magician, and soon they're on the hunt to find components for her greatest spell yet!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Tie One On! : Bulbasaur is ready to battle in Ash's next Johto League Silver Conference match...but will it be able to defeat a powerful Meganium?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Ties That Bind : It's Ash versus his oldest rival, Gary, in the Johto League Silver Conference, and both Trainers are ready to give it all they've got. But who will come out on top?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Can't Beat The Heat : Ash and Gary's Johto League Silver Conference battle is all tied up, with Gary's formidable Blastoise facing off against Ash's Heracross. As the tension rises, who will be victorious?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Playing With Fire! : After defeating Gary in the last round, Ash has to take on his new friend Harrison in the Johto League Silver Conference. Will our hero be able to stop the challenger from the Hoenn region?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Johto Photo Finish : The scorching battle between Ash and Harrison rages on, with Charizard taking on Blaziken, a Pokémon from the Hoenn region!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Gotta Catch Ya Later! : With his Johto League adventure behind him, Ash has decided to head back to Pallet Town. But it's all too soon before he has to say goodbye to Brock and Misty, and head out alone for a new adventure!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Hoenn Alone! : The Hoenn region is on Ash's mind, and he's preparing to board a ship bound there when Team Rocket strikes! With Pikachu missing and time running out before the boat leaves, can Ash get his adventure back on track?

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: Get the Show on the Road : Pikachu is suffering from a serious electrical overload! Can Ash and Professor Birch find a solution before it's too late?

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: A Ruin with a View : A power failure at the Pokémon Center leads Ash and his new friend May to an astonishing discovery!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: There's No Place Like Hoenn : Ash is ready for his first Gym battle in the Hoenn region—and the Gym Leader he must face is none other than May's father!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: You Never Can Taillow : When Team Rocket turns a flock of Taillow against our heroes, an old friend comes to the rescue!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: In the Knicker of Time : Ash and friends meet an eccentric Trainer who challenges May to her very first Pokémon battle!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: A Poached Ego : Our heroes are on the trail of a Pokémon poacher, and Team Rocket is close behind!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: Tree's a Crowd : When Ash gets lost in the woods, he meets a Treecko who's determined to save its forest home.

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: A Tail with a Twist : Ash's Treecko takes on a wild Seviper, but things don't go so well…

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: Taming of the Shroomish : Stopping in Rinshin Town, our heroes investigate the mystery of a haunted mansion!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: You Said a Mouthful! : Ash can't resist challenging a Trainer who claims to have the world's most powerful Pokémon, but there's something odd about this battle…

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: A Bite to Remember : After meeting a group of Mightyena, Max befriends a Poochyena who hasn't evolved yet and decides to train it himself!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: The Lotad Lowdown : Our heroes meet three sisters who grow berries with the help of a nearby group of Lotad!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: All Things Bright and Beautifly! : Ash and friends discover a whole new kind of Pokémon competition, and it seems May has found her calling!

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Beetle Juiced : David is a Volkswagen fanatic who wants a 1967 Beetle that can outmatch muscle cars. Robert wants a widened 1967 Corvette supercar, but first FantomWorks have to undo the bad repairs from at least three fiberglass rending accidents.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Mad Mustang Part-1/2 : Arthur bought his Cyclone new in 1967. Then, his father put 400,000 miles on it. Now, he wants FantomWorks to make it better than new. Antonio and his cousin Andres challenge Dan to build the fastest Mustang CS in Mexico.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Mad Mustang Part-2/2 : FantomWorks finish the build of the ultimate Mustang Sleeper, a California Special powered by a Coyote Aluminator. Phil wants a 1949 Chevy Pick-up, but the truck is a disassembled jigsaw puzzle with a lot of pieces missing.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Against the Grain : Chris asks FantomWorks to breathe new life into a 1951 Mercury Woody that was sitting in a chicken coop for thirty years. Dan’s 1970 Mustang Boss arrives with a long list of problems and the speed of a sea slug.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Elephant In The Room : Kolin asks Dan to repair his smashed up 1973 Corvette, but Dan finds major problems that existed before the accident. Jim wants Dan to build him an asphalt crushing 1970 Challenger convertible by adding a 426 Hemi with all the fixin’s.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Bow Tie ‘til I Die : Jay brings Dan a 2012 Camaro ZL1 with poor performance and a blown supercharger. Terry wants Dan to complete a high-powered restomod of a 1931 Landau Phaeton, but the car arrives with mismatched parts and an engine that should have stayed in the junkyard.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Flatheads Forever : Arnold brings Dan two interlocking projects. He wants FantomWorks to transform his 1946 Ford Panel Wagon into a classic tour-mobile, and he also wants Dan to fix the 1941 Harley Flathead motorcycle that will ride in the back.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Exorcism In The ER : A man goes into anaphylactic shock; a tough guy fears needles; a man stabs himself with a ninja sword; a patient believes she needs an exorcism.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Naughty Nomad : When a client rolls into Count's Kustoms with a beautiful 1955 Chevy Nomad, Danny can't help but want the car for his collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Low Riding Lincoln : Lonnie, one of the shop's long time painters, wants to give his Lincoln lowrider a new, but simple, paint job. Meanwhile, Mike and Paul find a Rolls Royce that used to belong to Donny and Marie Osmond.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Champion Chopper : When the World Series of Poker guys want a Count's Kustoms chopper as the ultimate online giveaway, Danny is determined to make it something special. Meanwhile, Mike and Ryan check go for a spin in a 1957 Bel Air.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Big Truck Custom Combo : Danny is commissioned to custom paint a brand new pick-up for a charity auction for the local YMCA. But Danny can't stop at paint, he adds the ultimate accessory a matching chopper that fits in the back.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Heavy Metal Caddy : Brann Dailor, drummer for the Grammy-winning heavy metal band Mastodon, brings in his 1970 Cadillac Coupe DeVille for some much needed Counts Kustoms love.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds' Rides : Vegas Golden Knights goalie Marc-Andre Fleury comes to Count's Kustoms looking for an All-American muscle car fit for a three-time Stanley Cup champion.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Red, Hot, and Dangerous : Danny has big plans for a little street rocket known as a Manta, and the crew commissions an 80s era Corvette that the owner wants to bring into the new millennium. Shannon meets a motorcycle racer who wants her Harley XR1200 customized.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny Doubles Down : The massive auto extravaganza known as SEMA is rolling into Las Vegas, and this time Danny will be ready. He's getting not one, but two incredible Counts Kustoms creations ready for the big show.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Flatheads Forever : Arnold brings Dan two interlocking projects. He wants FantomWorks to transform his 1946 Ford Panel Wagon into a classic tour-mobile, and he also wants Dan to fix the 1941 Harley Flathead motorcycle that will ride in the back.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Brick by Bricklin : Walter brings his 1975 Bricklin back to FantomWorks with the hope that Dan can fix problems that were created when it was built. And then add missiles. Tim’s 1954 Imperial hasn’t run in decades and everything on the car is locked up solid.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Metro Mayhem (Part 1) : David and Chuck want their family heirloom 1961 International Harvester Metro Van converted into a state-of-the-art restomod, with all the trimmings. David asks Dan to find and restore a very specific car he’s always wanted: a 1966 Lincoln Convertible.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Metro Mayhem (Part 2) : FantomWorks epic 4 year long wrestling match with the 1961 International Harvester Metro concludes with an incredible, one-of-a-kind van. Ray wants his 1969 ZL1 to match the number 68 rally car, but he needs Dan’s rare Winters stamped 427 COPO motor.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Stews of the Arabian Gulf : Arabian Gulf pot pie; braised lamb shanks with okra; curried swordfish stew; red lentil vegetable stew.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Breads : Date flatbreads; flatout bread with seeds and raisin; coconut mandazi; eggplant flatbread.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Side Dishes : Creamed coconut spinach; eggplant with herbs and yogurt; cauliflower salad with roasted chickpeas; za'atar smashed potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Entertaining for a Crowd : Chicken kabsa; stuffed cabbage and spiced lamb chops; orzo risotto with wild mushrooms; a sweet cake called kumajj.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Dates : Chicken machbous; mansaf; beef biryani; lamb ghouzi.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Coastal Favorites : Recipes featuring the bounty of the Arabian Gulf include crab croquettes, date pancakes, lamb dumplings and fava bean dip.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking With Grains : Kamut and roasted vegetables; mixed grain pilaf with chicken; herbed barley salad with dates.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Vegetables : Simple vegetable side dishes include steamed spinach, sauteed broccoli rabe, roasted cauliflower steaks, brown sugar-glazed carrots, sauteed sugar snap peas and shelled peas with mint and lemony kale salad.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Steaming : Cooking chicken breasts in parchment paper; cleaning and steaming mussels; using a bamboo steamer to prepare steamed salmon and peas.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Roasting : Roast chicken; roasted root vegetable salad; green peppercorn-crusted roast tenderloin of beef.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden : Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Easy Homemade Dumplings : Martha, Monica Tran Carden, and Andrew Yu make homemade dumplings; Martha and Monica hand-make wontons and pork dumplings; Andrew and Martha prepare jade dumplings and pork and shrimp dumplings.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: The Bagel Show : Martha samples bagel toppings and is joined by Gary Greengrass, owner of Barney Greengrass, an NYC staple; at PopUp Bagels, Martha makes bagels and constructs breakfast sandwiches with Adam Goldberg.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha's Favorite Cakes : Martha makes the classic meringue cake from Casa Cipriani with pastry chef Alessia Tomassetti; Martha and bakery owner Lucie Franc De Ferriere bake a pear raspberry cake with jam and maple buttercream.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Vegan Cuisine Redefined : Martha and Chef Daniel Humm make redefined vegan dishes; Martha and Chef Daniel make a refreshing cocktail and gazpacho, followed by mushroom and seaweed baked rice and a rhubarb cobbler for dessert.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Amazing Houseplants : Martha brings the outdoors inside the home and shares her love of houseplants; she shows how to take care of the most popular houseplants and how to propagate them to create new plants.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The World of Succulents : Martha explores how to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse; Seed Starting : Martha takes us inside her vegetable greenhouse to see how she has turned her harvest into a year-round bounty; she collects, stores, and sows seeds, and makes her perfect green drink.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The Incredible World of Orchids : Martha visits the incredible Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; this year's show immerses you in a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Hens and Chicks : Now with over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her vast knowledge about raising and caring for her flock; learn the how-tos of building a coop.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden : Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Everything's Coming Up Roses : Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; Martha is creating a brand new rose garden with almost 200 roses; from color to fragrance, the inspired world of roses is a very good thing.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Poaching : Using poached chicken breast in chicken salad sandwiches and Cobb salad; poached salmon steaks; poached eggs.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Perfect Roast : Rib roast; crown roast of pork; stuffed turkey breast; the best cuts for roasting.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Soups : Homemade chicken soup; minestrone; veloute.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Vegetables : Blanching, steaming and roasting vegetables.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Howling Wind of Betrayal : Kagura approaches Sesshomaru and tells him to kill Naraku, but Sesshomaru refuses.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Terror of the Faceless Man : A demon born from a piece of flesh that Naraku discarded transforms into a man without a face and steals the handsome face of Muso, a traveling monk.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.desc: Shiori's Family and Inuyasha's Feelings : Myoga comes to deliver a message from Totosai.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kirara Come Home! : Kirara disappears. Sango is worried. Shippo deduces Kirara's reasons for disappearing.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo and Kagome: Alone in the Cave : Kagome is lured to a cave by a voice calling for help. Kagome enters the cave and meets Kikyo.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Truth Behind the Nightmare: Battle in the Forest of Sorrow : Garamaru, a poisonous moth demon, has trapped Kagome and the others in a cocoon. Kagome and the others are each suffering within their nightmares.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Snow from Seven Years Past : Snow is falling out of season. Miroku is abducted by Koyuki, a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Assault on the Wolf-Demon Tribe! : A giant ogre appears in the mountains to the north. His name is Kyokotsu. Kyokotsu eats demons when he can. He attacks the demon wolf tribe.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Band of Seven Resurrected! : The Band of Seven, a group of ghosts, have been brought back to life.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show

programme.title: The Best of the Carol Burnett Show

programme.desc: Comic Legends Of The '60s - Joan Rivers (10/15/82) : Hear what Joan Rivers has to say about retouched magazine covers, Gone With The Wind and Dolly Parton. Plus, Johnny welcomes Japanese TV personality Tetsuko Kuroyanagi.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Bronx : The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Iran : Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Jamaica : In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Scotland : In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: South Korea : After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Miami : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Madagascar : In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Budapest : For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Israel : Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Copenhagen : Tony explores Copenhagen, the economic and cultural center of Denmark.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily : Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Detroit : Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tokyo : Tony travels to Tokyo in search of the city's dark, extreme underside.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: South Africa : Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Las Vegas : Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Punjab : Tony dives into the state of Punjab, India, starting off in Amritsar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Lyon, France : Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Mexico City : Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Glimmers and Ghosts : The Fly Team and Smitty reunite with Jaeger in Berlin as they all delve into a case involving an unidentified American who killed an elderly German man who appears to have been a covert asset of the ruthless Stasi in East Germany during the Cold War.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Indefensible : The Fly Team investigates the death of an American lawyer working out of Budapest after he is killed by a car bomb. Also, Kellett begins to grow close to Hungarian lieutenant Benedek Erdős (Miklós Bányai) as the critical case progresses.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Apex : Maggie and Dana struggle to find justice for victims murdered by a serial killer; the mayor limits the investigation to cut costs.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Most Wanted : OA and Maggie team up with members of the FBI's Fugitives Department to track down a person wanted for murder who is also on America's Top 10 Most Wanted list.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Trust : The Fly Team lends a helping hand to the Hungarian National Police when one of their police officers is accused of murdering a couple in Budapest. Also, Kellett questions her relationship with Lieutenant Erdős.

programme.title: FBI: International

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI

programme.desc: Hope : While connected to the stones in an attempt to contact Homeworld Command, Chloe wakes up with Ginn’s consciousness. Eli must find a way to protect Chloe without losing Ginn. Meanwhile, Volker requires a difficult operation to save his life.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Seizure : Homeworld Command tries to convince an ally they suspect might be infiltrated by the Lucian Alliance to let them use their planet to power up and dial Destiny. Meanwhile, Rush is trapped in a simulation created by Amanda Perry.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Hunt : While exploring a planet, the team is attacked and members are taken captive by an alien creature. The team must turn to Varro and his Lucian team for help. Meanwhile, on Destiny, Eli and Brody mistakenly trap Brody in a cryogenic device.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Avalon (Part 1) : Lieutenant Colonel Cameron Mitchell, the newest member of the SG-1 team, sets out on a mission with Daniel Jackson, Teal'c and Vala to uncover a stash of hidden ancient riches. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Avalon (Part 2) : Still bound together by the Jaffa bracelets, Daniel Jackson and Vala are transported to a galaxy populated by worshippers of a potentially threatening authority called the Ori. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Origin : Daniel and Vala learn that their reactivation of an ancient communications device has inadvertently exposed Earth to the wrath of the group of unforgiving deities called Ori. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Epilogue : Returning the settlers to their home planet Novus, the Destiny crew discover the planet has been abandoned and is on the verge of seismic destruction. While pouring through an underground archive, the crew learns of the true origins of Novus.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Blockade : When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Gauntlet : After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Rising (Part 1) : A new Stargate team, lead by Dr. Elizabeth Weir (Torri Higginson) embarks on a dangerous mission to a distant galaxy , where they discover the mythical lost city of Atlantis -- and a deadly new enemy that feeds on human fear. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Moebius (Part 1) : Jackson receives documents that point to the location of a ZPM in ancient Egypt. Hoping that the energy source could be used to power Earth's defenses and open a wormhole to Atlantis, SG-1 uses an ancient time machine to travel back to 3000 B.C.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Moebius (Part 2) : SG-1's attempt to recover a ZPM from 3000 B.C. has altered the timeline, leading to a present where the Stargate was never discovered! The alternate-reality Carter and Jackson convince a reluctant O'Neill to take them on their first mission through.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Avalon (Part 1) : Lieutenant Colonel Cameron Mitchell, the newest member of the SG-1 team, sets out on a mission with Daniel Jackson, Teal'c and Vala to uncover a stash of hidden ancient riches. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Cost Of Living : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) finally have their day in court with an old foe (guest star John Harkins), as Charlie (guest star Dick O'Neill) begins drinking again. Meanwhile Mary Beth is haunted by a violent criminal from the past.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Waste Deep : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate an illegal toxic-waste dumping incident at the behest of an environmental activist (guest star Didi Conn). Mary Beth has another cancer scare. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Ahead Of The Game : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) suspect foul play when a basketball player's mysterious death reveals drug abuse of a surprising nature. After the Lacey home is ransacked, Mary Beth tries to track down a family heirloom that was taken.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Favors : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of a sleazy loan shark brings charges of corruption and favoritism upon a judge (guest star Robert Cornthwaite) who is friends with Charlie Cagney (guest star Dick O'Neill).

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Easy Does It : While assisting Lacey (Tyne Daly) in a stakeout at an Alcoholics Anonymous meeting center, Cagney (Sharon Gless) begins to realize the full impact of Charlie's (guest star Dick O'Neill) alcoholism and her own heavy drinking. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: To Sir With Love : The 14th Precinct becomes a three-ring circus as Cagney (Sharon Gless) plans the annual division dinner honoring Lt. Samuels (Al Waxman). Lacey (Tyne Daly) prepares for Alice Christine's first birthday. Also starring Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Divine Couriers : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate a 'travel agent' (guest star Lois Nettleton) who claims to be able to get messages to those who have passed on, by sending them along with the terminally ill. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: ...Right To Remain Silent : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of a deaf teenage fugitive is compromised by their compassion towards her handicap. Meanwhile, David Keeler (guest star Stephen Macht) asks Cagney for forgiveness. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Greed : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) reluctantly go undercover as game show contestants to investigate a crooked television show. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels, Martin Kove as Victor Isbecki, and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Secrets : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) turn up evidence of police corruption after an undercover investigation goes awry, and Lacey deals with the arrival of her father in Harvey Jr.'s (Tony La Toree) life. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Don't I Know You? : Cagney (Sharon Gless) falls victim to a date-rape by a respected individual and risks further emotional upset when she decides to file charges against her attacker. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Old Flames : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the disappearance of two retirement home residents while the Christmas season rekindles feelings of loss in the detectives' personal lives. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Trading Places : Harvey, against Lacey's objections, agrees to go undercover to help nab a deadly racketeer who has threatened him, while Cagney battles with the young police academy lieutenant assigned to run the squad in Lt. Samuel's absence.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Shadow Of A Doubt : An Internal Affairs investigation invades the personal lives of Cagney and Lacey after an undercover assignment results in Cagney being tested positive for drugs. Meanwhile, the rest of the squad prepares for Isbecki's bachelor party and wedding.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Hello/Goodbye : The detectives investigate a rash of bogus 911 emergency calls from a Times Square hotel, while Keeler's (guest star Stephen Macht) marriage proposal to Cagney (Sharon Gless) yields a surprising answer. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: School Daze : A refresher course at the police academy provides opportunities that neither Cagney nor Lacey expected. In the meantime, a rash of parking meter rip-offs provide the duo with an opportunity to use their newly acquired interrogation skills.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Land Of The Free : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) become enmeshed in political intrigue when they investigate an apparent gang-related murder, while Cagney mulls over accepting a date with a man she meets at an A.A. meeting. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: A Class Act : Lacey experiences feelings of inadequacy when she and Cagney mingle with the inner circles of the art world during their investigation of a stolen painting. Meanwhile, Cagney and Nick address the possibility that their relationship may not work.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Ballerina : Kellie Conrad dances and her father plays the fiddle to earn a living. Hoss feels a sense of guilt after he unintentionally hurts the arm that Kellie's father uses to play the fiddle, in a saloon fight with some roughnecks.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Once a Doctor : Hoss' latest acquaintance, an Englishman named Professor Poppy, is actually Percival Alexander Mundy, M.D., who has given up the practice of medicine. However, when Hoss is shot in the back, only Mundy's skill can save his life.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Flannel-Mouth Gun : Adam becomes involved with a quick-triggered range detective hired by the Virginia City Cattleman's Association to find out who is responsible for all the rustling going on in the area.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Underdog : Little Joe convinces Ben to hire Harry Starr, a half-Indian who is accused by other ranchers of being a chronic horse thief. Joe sets out to prove the others wrong, but is the youngest Cartwright's trust misplaced?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Saga of Squaw Charlie : A peaceful Indian is framed for the kidnapping of a young girl, a stunt which ends of tragedy.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Far, Far Better Thing : On their way to prevent a young woman from encountering the renegade Indians, Joe and Tuck are captured, and in order to save them all, Joe must fight Sharp Tongue, who is the leader of the band who went to school with Joe as a youth.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Ponderosa Birdman : Professor Klump and Amanda pull Hoss into their flying machine scheme. The ""Hoss-mobile""doesn't seem to be destined for a great take-off.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Once a Doctor : Hoss' latest acquaintance, an Englishman named Professor Poppy, is actually Percival Alexander Mundy, M.D., who has given up the practice of medicine. However, when Hoss is shot in the back, only Mundy's skill can save his life.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Flannel-Mouth Gun : Adam becomes involved with a quick-triggered range detective hired by the Virginia City Cattleman's Association to find out who is responsible for all the rustling going on in the area.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Search : Adam sets out to track down the man who has been impersonating him to clear his reputation.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Right Is the Fourth R : While working as a substitute teacher, Adam uncovers an ugly secret about the territory's past that others prefer remain hidden.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Deadliest Game : The Cartwrights play host to Guido Borelli, a world renowed aerial acrobat who once saved Ben's life in Italy. Borelli's troup is beset by internal strife, and is performing in Virginia City.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hound Dog : Cousin Muley Jones returns to the Ponderosa, along with a pack of noisy hound dogs, in this funny sequel to "The Saga Of Muley Jones".

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A Good Night's Rest : First Ben's sons are making lots of noise, so he goes into town to sleep in the hotel. Then, various noises and things interrupt Ben's sleep. Will he ever get his desired good night's rest?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Trap : One of Joe's old girlfriends thinks he killed her husband so they could come together. Unfortunately, that is what her husband's twin brother also believes.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: To Own the World : One of the wealthiest men in the world, Charles Augustus Hackett, offers to buy the Ponderosa, price no object. Ben says the ranch is not for sale and Hackett refuses to give up.
